nameMeanings.name: Kinge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: King
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English king ‘king’ (Old English cyning, cyng), perhaps acquired by someone with kingly qualities or as a pageant name by someone who had acted the part of a king or had been chosen as the master of ceremonies or ‘king’ of an event such as a tournament, festival or folk ritual. In North America, the surname King has absorbed several European cognates and equivalents with the same meaning, for example German König (see Koenig ) and Küng, French Roy , Slovenian, Croatian, or Serbian Kralj , Polish Krol . It is also very common among African Americans. It is also found as an artificial Jewish surname.
English: occasionally from the Middle English personal name King, originally an Old English nickname from the vocabulary word cyning, cyng ‘king’.
Irish: adopted for a variety of names containing the syllable rí (which means ‘king’ in Irish).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Kinge was born about 1510, in Swanbourne, Buckinghamshire, England. He married Mrs Kinge about 1532, in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Kinge est né environ 1510, à Swanbourne, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Mrs Kinge environ 1532, à Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Kinge wurde um 1510 in Swanbourne, Buckinghamshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1532 in Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England Mrs Kinge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Kinge è nato il circa 1510 nel Swanbourne, Buckinghamshire, England. Lui sposato Mrs Kinge circa 1532, nel Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Kingeは約1510年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアスワンボウルンで生まれた。約1532年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアアストン クリントンでMrs Kingeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Kinge(은)는 대략 1510년 영국 벅잉함실르 스완보우른에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1532년 영국 벅잉함실르 애스턴 클린턴에서 Mrs Kinge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Kinge nasceu aproximadamente 1510, em Swanbourne, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Mrs Kinge aproximadamente 1532, em Aston Clinton, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Kinge родился около 1510 г. в местности сванбурн, буккингхамшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Kinge около 1532 г. в местности астон клинтон, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери.
